---
title: "Nosocomial Infection Model"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(Matrix)
library(igraph)
library(epicontacts)
library(visNetwork)
library(expm)

source("plot_functions.R")
source("prep_functions.R")
source("two_wards_data.R")
source("parameters.R")
source("outbreak_simulation.R")
source("mcmc.R")
```

## Outbreak Simulation

```{r}
#| label: simulate

set.seed(3)
T <- 50
OutbreakData <- simulate_outbreak(T, theta)
```

## Timeline Plots

```{r}
#| label: fig-full-unobserved
#| fig-cap: "Full outbreak (unobserved), all stays shown."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, observed = FALSE, show_all_stays = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-observed-default
#| fig-cap: "Observed outbreak (default view)."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-observed-all-stays
#| fig-cap: "Observed outbreak, all stays shown."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, show_all_stays = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-no-tree-all-stays
#| fig-cap: "No transmission tree, all stays shown."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, show_tree = FALSE, show_all_stays = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-no-tree-unobserved-all-stays
#| fig-cap: "No transmission tree, unobserved, all stays shown."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, show_tree = FALSE, observed = FALSE, show_all_stays = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-no-tree-observed
#| fig-cap: "No transmission tree, observed, stays hidden."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, show_tree = FALSE, observed = TRUE, show_all_stays = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-flipped
#| fig-cap: "Flipped timeline."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, flip = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-edge-width-gen
#| fig-cap: "Timeline with edge width scaled by generation."

plot_timeline(OutbreakData, edge_width_by = "gen")
```

## MCMC

```{r}
#| label: mcmc
#| cache: true

Y <- mcmc(OutbreakData, N_samples = 10000)
```
